title: DMZ Evolution
description: DMZ Evolution is a Spanish-speaking DragonMineZ server, pioneering as the first Spanish community to launch on version 2.0 of the mod.
body:
### 🌌 **DMZ Evolution**

**DMZ Evolution** is a Spanish-speaking server based on DragonMineZ, and the first Hispanic community to launch on version 2.0.

Step into a world built for progression and power:

* 🧬 **Custom races** with their own identity
* 🧍 **Custom NPCs** across the server
* 🛡️ **Custom armors** and unique gear
* 🧩 **Our own custom mod**
* 📖 **Sagas & missions** to follow your path
* 🥋 **Training system** to grow stronger
* 🏰 **Survival + Factions** experience

Forge your path, rise in power, and become part of a growing world.

> 🚀 **This is just the beginning — more is coming.**
